stemHtml:
On a given flight path, it is possible to choose between four flight levels FL, each associated with a mandatory flight Mach number M. The flight conditions, static air temperature SAT and headwind component HWC are given below:

FL 370: M = 0.80, SAT = -60° C, HWC = 15 kt
FL 330: M = 0.78, SAT = -60° C, HWC= 5 kt
FL 290: M = 0.80, SAT = -55° C, HWC = 15 kt
FL 270: M = 0.76, SAT = -43° C, HWC = 0

The Flight Level allowing the highest Ground Speed is..
